'''Kerl''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] who served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]]' [[Echo Flight]].<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />

==Biography==
===Briefing===
In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], [[Station TFP-9]] was [[Battle at TFP-9|attacked]] by what was assumed to be [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] consisting of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] with a [[Hornet-class carrier]] serving as their [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]. He was assigned as [[Echo Two (Echo Flight)|Echo Two]] for a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of twelve [[N-X Police Cruiser/Legends|N-X Police Cruisers]]. He would be watched over by two [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighters]] from [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo]] [[Bravo Seven|Seven]], piloted by [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]] and [[Bravo Eight|Eight]], piloted by [[Dren Melne]], who was secretly contracted by the [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Challep]] to steal both N-1s and some of the cruisers.<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />

===Battle===
When the Naboo fighters arrived both squadrons engaged and drove the Z-95s to their carrier with Echo flight taking minor damage. Till then asked [[Echo One]], piloted by [[Evenyl Yob]], and Kerl, to join her and Dren for an attack run on the Carrier with [[proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. Kerl was so excited he would be challenged against a [[capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] that he screamed. It was then that more Z-95s arrived, surprising Yob abd Kerl; it was a second Hornet-class Carrier, ''[[Velumina]]'', that launched fresh Z-95s.<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />

The first carrier dropped [[Droid starfighter/Legends|Droid]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and Till ordered her group to concentrate on them. It was then that [[Bravo Eight]], [[Dren Melne]], betrayed Naboo by breaking formation and opened fire. Kerl didn't know where the attack came from, Yob told him it was Melne. Kerl could only watch as his [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]. Till tried to shoot at Bravo Eight, as Kerl's right nacelle exploded and started spinning; his dome crashed on Echo One's hull, destroying her [[astromech droid/Legends|astromech]], and careened away.<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />

Till attempted to regroup the flight, and everyone was surprised when Echo Two reported back, with their fighter floating in pieces. Till promised they would rescue the pilot.<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />
